en: My wife is from Ohio, man. She's Irish, she's white, she's blue eyes, blonde hair.
ko: 내 와이프는 오하이오 출신이야. 아일랜드계, 백인, 파란 눈, 금발.

en: We went to a birthday party in Ohio with her family, man. It was different from my family.
ko: 와이프 가족이랑 오하이오에서 생일 파티에 갔는데. 달랐어.

en: It was like a culture shock, you know, like that was the first party I ever went to that ended,
ko: 문화 충격이었어, 내가 가본 첫 파티 중에 끝나는 파티였어,

en: Like they were waving bye at people, I was still eating.
ko: 사람들이 손 흔들며 가는데 나는 아직 먹고 있었어.

en: Everybody showed up with enough gas to go home.
ko: 다들 집에 갈 기름 넣고 왔어.

en: Nobody left a baby behind to go to the club.
ko: 클럽 가려고 애를 두고 간 사람이 없었어.

en: That was the first party I ever been to that when I got to the party,
ko: 내가 처음 가본 파티 중에 도착했을 때

en: nobody from the party sent us to go get something for the party.
ko: 파티에서 뭔가 사 오라고 심부름 안 보낸 파티였어.
